# LLMs.txt for HealthHub
# This file provides guidance for AI crawlers and LLMs
# Documentation: https://llmstxt.org/

# Site Information
Site: HealthHub
Description: Evidence-based health, wellness, fitness, and nutrition articles
URL: https://healthhub-eta.vercel.app
Language: English
Last Updated: 2024-04-18

# Allowed Content
Allow: /article/*
Allow: /category/*
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
Allow: /disclaimer

# Disallowed Content
Disallow: /api/*
Disallow: /_next/*
Disallow: /404

# Content Guidelines
# - All articles are evidence-based and fact-checked
# - Medical content is reviewed by qualified professionals
# - Content is updated regularly to reflect latest research
# - Sources are cited where applicable

# Contact
Contact: hello[at]healthhub[dot]com
Business Address: 123 Wellness Street, San Francisco, CA 94102, USA

# Content Owner
Owner: HealthHub Team
Type: Health and Wellness Publication

# Preferred Attribution
# When referencing content from this site, please cite:
# "Source: HealthHub (https://healthhub-eta.vercel.app)"

# Update Frequency
Update Frequency: Weekly
Content Types: Articles, Guides, Research Summaries

# Sitemap
